# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14, 16]
        python-version: [3.8, 3.9]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    - name: Cache Node.js modules
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.npm
          node_modules
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ matrix.node-version }}-

    - name: Install Node.js dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Cache pip packages
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ matrix.python-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ matrix.python-version }}-

    - name: Install Python dependencies
      run: pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache build outputs
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: |
          build/
          dist/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.node-version }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/build-config.yaml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ matrix.node-version }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}-

    - name: Build project
      run: |
        npm run build
        python setup.py build

    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        npm test
        pytest tests/
